productName: RedEyesGreenDragon ( S ) Chef Joe's - Flipside Distillate Disposable 1g
description: This hybrid disposable carries RedEyesGreenDragon in a ready-to-go pen with the battery built right in — grab it, hit it, recycle it when it's done. Simple, smooth, portable, a balanced, sweet-earthy profile, leading into a smooth, well-rounded vibe.
